    "**gNB-CU Actions:**",
    "1. Determines to initiate LTM configuration.",
    "2. Initiates the procedure by sending a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU.",
    "3. Includes one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.",
    "4. May provide the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE to the candidate gNB-DU.",
    "5. May request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU.",
    "6. May request the candidate gNB-DU to provide the lower layer configuration for generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration.",
    "7. If the LTM Indicator IE set to \"true\" is contained in the LTM Information Setup IE, considers that the request concerns LTM for the included SpCell ID IE.",
    "8. If the Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE set to \"true\" is contained within the Reference Configuration IE, expects the lower layer configuration in the Reference Configuration Information IE in the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "9. If the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE is contained, considers this as the mapping information for the LTM candidate cell(s).",
    "10. If the Early Sync Information Request IE is included, expects the Early Sync Information IE of the accepted candidate cell for early TA acquisition in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "11. Upon reception of the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, if the Early UL Sync Configuration IE is included, considers it as the generated early UL sync information from the accepted candidate cell.",
    "12. If the Early UL Sync Configuration for SUL IE is included, considers it as the generated early UL sync information for SUL from the accepted candidate cell.",
    "13. If the LTM Configuration IE is included, considers it as the generated configuration for LTM from the accepted candidate cell.",
    "14. If the Complete Candidate Configuration Indicator IE set to \"complete\" is contained in the LTM Configuration IE, considers that the LTM candidate configuration is a complete candidate configuration.",
    "",
    "**candidate gNB-DU Actions:**",
    "1. Receives the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message from the gNB-CU.",
    "2. If no UE-associated logical F1-connection exists, establishes it as part of the procedure.",
    "3. If the LTM Indicator IE set to \"true\" is contained in the LTM Information Setup IE, considers that the request concerns LTM for the included SpCell ID IE.",
    "4. Regards the procedure as a reconfiguration with sync as defined in TS 38.331 [8].",
    "5. If the Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE set to \"true\" is contained within the Reference Configuration IE, provides the lower layer configuration in the Reference Configuration Information IE in the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "6. If the Reference Configuration Information IE is contained within the Reference Configuration IE, takes it into account for generating the LTM lower layer configuration.",
    "7. If the CSI Resource Configuration is contained in the LTM Information Setup IE, uses it to generate the LTM CSI reporting configuration(s) in the CellGroupConfig IE for the requested LTM candidate cell.",
    "8. If the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE is contained, considers this as the mapping information for the LTM candidate cell(s).",
    "9. If the Early Sync Information Request IE is included, includes the Early Sync Information IE of the accepted candidate cell for early TA acquisition (early UL synchronisation) in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.",
    "10. If it succeeds to establish the UE context and accepts the request of LTM configuration, replies to the gNB-CU with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.",
    "11. If not able to establish an F1 UE context, or cannot even establish one bearer, or is not able to accept the SpCell ID IE, considers the procedure as failed and replies with the UE CONTEXT SETUP FAILURE message.",
    "12. If the LTM Indicator IE was included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, includes the received SpCell ID IE as the Requested Target Cell ID IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP FAILURE message."
